description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a prominent hip roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior features a combination of light and dark gray walls, accented by large, rectangular green-tinted windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The front facade includes a balcony with a metal railing above a covered entryway, and a stone-tiled porch at ground level. The rear and side elevations display a mix of window sizes, including a small square window and a larger vertical window, as well as a secondary entry platform. The house's clean lines, flat surfaces, and minimal ornamentation reflect a contemporary architectural style. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass windows and metal railings.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, gray walls, large green-tinted windows, and a front balcony above a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, balcony with metal railing, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting a vertical window, small square window, and a secondary platform.
description_view_2: Back view with a centered door, symmetrical window arrangement, and a small entry step.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three large windows on the lower floor and a projecting upper section.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and a few small accent windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entry with a single door, stone-tiled steps, and a balcony above supported by columns
